reasoning: 1. TP Dist: 2815.0. 2. SL Dist: 1500.0. 3. TP/SL Ratio: 1.87. 4. Floor Check: Price 70000.0 is significantly above POC 67184.96. 5. Logic: The 15m teal wedge is a Bear Flag following a sharp rejection from the 74k ATH. Declining volume on the bounce indicates a lack of aggressive buying. The POC at 67,184.96 acts as a mean-reversion magnet. A breakdown of the wedge is expected to trigger a liquidation flush towards the high-volume support zone.
reasoning_zh: 1. TP 距离: 2815.0。2. SL 距离: 1500.0。3. 盈亏比: 1.87。4. 地板检查: 价格 70000.0 显著高于 POC 67184.96，存在回归需求。5. 逻辑: 15 分钟图上的青色楔形被识别为看跌旗形，是在 74k 历史高点受阻回落后的弱势整理。反弹期间成交量持续萎缩，暗示买盘枯竭。POC (67,184.96) 具有强大的磁吸效应，预计价格将跌破旗形并回测该高成交量支撑区。
